topFactorGaps.rootCause: No forge proposals are being submitted. IGNIS infrastructure projects default to direct implementation without a proposal pipeline.
topFactorGaps.intervention: Add forge-proposal-style entries to ignis/input/proposals.json for each brainstorm item from SIL. Treat each genius list item as a "proposal" with category, status, and description.

topFactorGaps.rootCause: No canon entries exist. Canon captures reusable creative patterns — IGNIS has these but they are not being serialized into the scoring layer.
topFactorGaps.intervention: Write IGNIS design decisions, algorithm patterns, and intelligence module contracts to ignis/input/canon.json. Each SIL improvement item that changes behavior is a canon pattern.
topFactorGaps.evidenceNeeded: ignis/input/canon.json with at least 5 canon patterns

topFactorGaps.rootCause: Low score because forge proposals, canon entries, and session events lack proposal/canon data. The combined metric needs all 5 data types present.
topFactorGaps.intervention: Once forge proposals and canon entries are populated, this factor lifts automatically. Ensure session events have improvementGroups data.

topFactorGaps.rootCause: Zero forge proposals means pipeline conversion rate is 0 by definition.
topFactorGaps.intervention: Mark SIL-committed items that were implemented as proposals with status="implemented" in proposals.json.
topFactorGaps.evidenceNeeded: proposals.json with status transitions from pending → implemented

topFactorGaps.rootCause: Session events do not carry improvementGroups data — entropy is 0 when groups map is empty.
topFactorGaps.intervention: Enrich session.audit events with improvementGroups field: { "intelligence": 3, "protocol": 2, "evidence": 1 }. This data already exists in SIL entries.
topFactorGaps.evidenceNeeded: session.audit events with non-empty improvementGroups map

rootCauseSummary: Forge proposal and canon entry fields are empty — the creativity pillar measures innovation pipeline health, which requires serialized proposal and pattern data that IGNIS currently produces implicitly (in SIL, CDR, brainstorm) but does not write to ignis/input/*.json feeds.
summary: Pillar repair: CREATIVITY at F (3,125.85/10000). 5 factor gaps identified. Estimated lift 9,360 pts from top 3 interventions. 0/5 interventions already tracked in outcome ledger.
